ferry.terminal: UQ St Lucia CityCat (across the river)
ferry.note: The Eleanor Schonell Bridge and the UQ ferry terminal sit within walking distance for parts of Dutton Park.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Dutton Park via Annerley Road and the inner-CBD corridor.

driving.motorway_access: M3 corridor for southern travel. Captain Cook Bridge for the CBD.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 5 to 9 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Eleanor Schonell Bridge to UQ St Lucia

secondary_state.name: Brisbane State High catchment may apply for parts

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: West End and South Brisbane precincts are within walking distance for dining, retail, and cultural access. PA Hospital sits adjacent.

pockets.name: Riverside / hospital precinct
pockets.character: Streets close to the river and the PA Hospital precinct. Mix of character and apartment stock.

buyer_profile.note: PA Hospital and UQ proximity drive a strong professional buyer base.
Apartment market close to the river and the CBD.
Parts of the suburb may fall within the Brisbane State High catchment.
